description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:2.7-alpine Docker image and defines a single stage called scrape_build_deploy. Add a job named pages in that stage that runs the following script commands in order: echo "stage scrape_build_deploy, job pages", ls -la, mkdir -p public/posts, ls -laR public/posts, mkdir -p content/ferries, ls -laR content/ferries, echo `date`, echo `date` > when.txt, echo `date` > `date`.txt, rm -rf public, mkdir -p public, pip install -r requirements.txt, python scrape_wsdot_and_build.py, ls -lR public/posts, ls -lR public/ferries, ls -lR content/ferries. Configure the job to cache the path content/ferries/, publish the public/ directory as an artifact, run only on the master branch, and retry once on failure.
